case_title: KOROTKIN ASSOCIATES, INC. VS. 815 TENNESSEE STREET HOA ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $950.00 FILED BY KOROTKIN ASSOCIATES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT 815 TENNESSEE STREET HOA FIRST SERVICE RESIDENTIAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE FIRST SERVICE AGENT CORP] SERVED NOV-28-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST SERVICE RESIDENTIAL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE FIRST SERVICE AGENT CORP.] FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOROTKIN ASSOCIATES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST SERVICE RESIDENTIAL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-13-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KOROTKIN ASSOCIATES, INC. REPRESENTED BY SHARON KOROTKIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS 815 TENNESSEE STREET HOA AND FIRST SERVICE RESIDENTIAL ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED TO THE COURT SHE WAS NOTIFIED OF A CHECK IN THE AMOUNT OF THE CLAIM BEING SENT TO HER IN THE AMOUNT OF THE CLAIM. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THIS MATTER, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE FIRST SERVICE AGENT CORP] SERVED NOV-28-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 815 TENNESSEE STREET HOA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE FIRST SERVICE AGENT CORP] FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOROTKIN ASSOCIATES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT 815 TENNESSEE STREET HOA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOROTKIN ASSOCIATES, INC.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY KOROTKIN ASSOCIATES, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF KOROTKIN ASSOCIATES, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS 815 TENNESSEE STREET HOA AND FIRST SERVICE RESIDENTIAL ARE NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
